title: Golden Light in Chiang Mai
description: Chiang Mai moves at the speed of a long exhale. Green stretches out in every direction, mountains hover behind clouds, and the afternoon heat softens everything into a kind of pleasant stillness.
coverAlt: Wide green lawn under dramatic clouds with distant mountains near Chiang Mai

images.alt: Lush green lawn stretching toward tropical trees and misty mountains under a cloudy sky
images.caption: The view from the veranda — mountains just barely visible through the afternoon clouds
